policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-sbns-02 - Disallow local authentication'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Service+Bus#IncidentremediationServiceBus#drcp-sbns-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Service Bus Deny local authentication methods
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creation of a Service Bus that uses local authentication methods. Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that Azure Service Bus namespaces exclusively require Microsoft Entra ID identities for authentication.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
